name: Stick
description: Basic wood gathered by hand and used in many early recipes.

name: Stone
description: A common mineral used for starter tools, upgrades, and construction.

name: Berries
description: Foraged food that helps round out early gathering costs.

name: Grass
description: Fibrous plant matter gathered with a Stone Knife for building and crafting.

name: Maple Logs
description: Heavy wood harvested with a Stone Axe and used for structures and fuel.

name: Flint
description: A harder stone that marks the transition into stronger crafting tiers.

name: Copper Ore
description: Raw copper-bearing rock that can later be processed into metal goods.

name: Raw Rabbit
description: Fresh game meat gathered by hunting with a Flint Spear.

name: Cooked Rabbit
description: A hot meal prepared at the Firepit from rabbit and fuel.

name: Coal
description: Fuel made from burning wood in a Firepit.
